title: あなたにボーノ、あたしもボーノ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm taking a break in the cafeteria, when...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Hmm. Hehehe! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Okay, the cream is done, and the height looks
perfect too! Our ginormous wedding cake turned
out splendidly! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In front of Hishi Akebono stands a large wedding
cake which towers over even her.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Well, I wanted to throw a party for me and the
other muses. We ran in wedding dresses, after all!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Our schedules have been a bit busy, so we
haven't had a chance to actually celebrate all our
hard work.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her explanation makes sense, but I'm still curious
about the huge number of cardboard boxes lined
up next to the cake.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
These? They're American-grown cherries! They're
my absolute favorite!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
They're big, juicy, and incredibly sweet! Once I
start eating them, I just can't stop!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I'm going to use a whole bunch to top the cake!
choice_data_list:
But they're your favorite. Are you okay with
using them all up?

But they're your favorite. Are you okay with
using them all up?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Of course! ♪ I want everyone to enjoy them!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Akebono! The muses have arrived!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Okay, coming! Thanks, Kawakami!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you should come along and eat up too. I still
owe you one for that the trip to the farm. ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I gladly accept and head to the party.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Okay, everyone! Go ahead and dig in!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Mmm! It's a culinary masterpiece! This cake tastes even more incredible than it looks!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hey, try the cherry part too! You'll love it!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
They're so sweet and juicy! Have you all tasted
the cherries?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Not yet. But the layers of sponge cake and cream
have wowed me enough already...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh, then you've gotta give it a try! ♪ I'll cut you a
slice!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Oh, um, thanks.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: You look like you're in bliss, Dober.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Uh, ah! I just...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Worry not, I know how you feel. This cake is truly
one of a kind.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I'm so happy! It's just so buono that
everyone's enjoying this wonderful meal
together! ☆
choice_data_list: Is that why you're sharing your cherries?
Is that why you're sharing your cherries?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I always feel buono when I eat them, so I
want everyone to enjoy them and be buono
too! ☆

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Happiness grows the more you share it! And
happiness is buono, buono!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: So, please, you have some too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My piece is so large it barely fits on the plate. I
take a giant bite, and as the cake fills my
cheeks...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: What do you think?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, what a wonderful expression you have!
Now you know what it means to be buono!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Go on, take some more! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Open up! Say "Ahhh!" Come on, a little bit more.
Ahhh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I find myself somewhat flustered by Hishi
Akebono's efforts to stuff my face with cake, but
I have a great time anyway.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I move to take the cake when...

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Why, hello there, my beautiful angels! ☆

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Oh my! Beauty Anshinzawa?

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, what a scrumptious-looking cake! Those
dark red toppings look utterly enticing. I feel
inspired all of a sudden!

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
But I come with a fair warning... An occasional
treat is one thing, but remember—moderation is a
thing of B.E.A.U.T.Y.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: ...Truuue! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the meal, the muses engage in some intense
training to burn off the excess calories...
